canonicalStatements.supportingPromise: Helping you discover it, build it, and share it with the world.
canonicalStatements.strategicPositioning: Build around the value only you can provide.

heroOptions.headline: Your Knowledge Has Value.
heroOptions.subheadline: Mindset Media Group helps you discover what you already know, build it into useful assets, and share it with the people who need it.

heroOptions.headline: Turn what you know into something you can build on.
heroOptions.subheadline: Kairos helps organize your ideas, skills, experience, and creativity into projects, content, products, and long-term assets.

heroOptions.headline: Build around the value only you can provide.
heroOptions.subheadline: MMG combines practical education, AI guidance, publishing, media, and business systems to help you bring your knowledge into the world with purpose.

positioningLines: Kairos is the guide that helps you keep moving forward.
Preserve your ideas. Organize your work. Build the next right thing.
Kairos turns scattered knowledge into structured progress.
Your work is not isolated content. It is a body of work in progress.
dashboardMicrocopy: Start with what you already know.
Package the value. Preserve the context. Move the work forward.
Every idea can become part of the system.
The next action should make the asset stronger.
